title: Full of Surprises

|timeline=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="Date">The events of '''''Full of Surprises''''' take place before the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], and after the introduction of the [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class light interceptor]], which {{Hnn|47|jediwatch/13314_1.html|New Jedi Starfighter Unveiled}} dates to 13:3:14 under the [[Great ReSynchronization]] dating system, equated to 22 BBY per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]]. Therefore, ''Full of Surprises'' must also take place in this [[Standard year/Legends|year]].</ref>

|next=''[[Most Precious Weapon]]''
}}
'''''Full of Surprises''''' was the first [[Hasbro]]/[[Toys "R" Us]]–exclusive [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] published in [[2002]].

==Plot summary==
[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] is heading towards a [[Mission to Albecus|meeting]] on [[Albecus]] in his [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor]] when he is ambushed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. Flying [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']], the notorious bounty hunter attempts to shoot down Kenobi. He is forced to open his hidden missile launcher to destroy the Jedi. After his ship is damaged by asteroids, Obi-Wan converts his starfighter to ''fight mode'', and uses the hidden laser cannons to damage ''Slave I'' and force Fett to flee.
